name: WOM Flow con BetterIMG
description: Flow per WOM con il miglioramento di immagini

pluginInfo.name: OCR IA
pluginInfo.description: Extract text from images using Google Gemma-4-26b-a4b-it via Koog (Kotlin)

capability.name: ocr
capability.description: Performs OCR on an image or a folder of images using Google Gemma-4-26b-a4b-it

save.description: Save output to a .txt file alongside each image

useStructuredOutput.description: Whether to use native structured output (might not be supported by all models)

model.description: The Gemini Model ID to use

outputs.name: extracted text
outputs.description: a list of strings representing the extracted text

outputs.name: bounding box
outputs.description: (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax), a list of lists of doubles representing the bounding box coordinates for each extracted text

outputs.name: page number
outputs.description: a list of integers representing the page number (1-indexed) for each extracted text

outputs.name: page name
outputs.description: a list of strings representing the filename/page name for each extracted text

outputs.name: failed files
outputs.description: a list of strings representing the filenames that failed to process

pluginInfo.name: Manhwa Translator AI
pluginInfo.description: Translate text from Manhwa/Manga into Italian using Google AI via Koog

capability.name: translate
capability.description: Translates a list of strings into Italian using Google AI

input.description: List of text strings to translate

dictionary.description: Dictionary of words/actions to keep the translation coherent

model.description: The Gemini Model ID to use

pluginInfo.name: PSD Builder
pluginInfo.description: A plugin that builds layered PSD files using PSD_builder.exe.

capability.name: Build PSD for Chapter
capability.description: Generates layered PSDs for a folder of images concurrently

bb.description: Bounding boxes to add, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)

pageNames.description: Page names corresponding to each text

leaveIntermediateFiles.description: Leave intermediate JSON files for debugging

pluginInfo.name: BetterIMG
pluginInfo.description: A plugin that processes images using the BetterIMG CLI tool.

capability.name: Image Processor
capability.description: Process a folder of images using BetterIMG CLI

outputs.name: OUTPUT DELL'UPSCALER (DEVE ESSERE DIVERSO DA QUELLO DELLA CARTELLA DI ORIGINE)

pluginInfo.name: Slicer
pluginInfo.description: A plugin that provides vertical images sliding capabilities for manhwa.
